zh.lifeSummary: John Bustard於1458年出生在英國奧可福爾阿德波利。他於大約1483年與Elizabeth Fox結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。他去世於1535年在他的家鄉享年77歲，埋葬在英國奧可福爾阿德波利。

zh-hans.Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England: 英国奧可福爾阿德波利
zh-hans.Fillongley, Warwickshire, England: 英国瓦維其可爾費隆格利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: John Bustard于1458年出生在英国奧可福爾阿德波利。他于大约1483年与Elizabeth Fox结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。他去世于1535年在他的家乡享年77岁，埋葬在英国奧可福爾阿德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Bustard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English bustarde ‘bustard’ (a large, heavily built bird, the males of which engage in spectacular courtship displays), from Old French bistarde, bustarde. There has been some confusion with Busteed .

variants.name: Busteed
meanings: Irish (Cork): unexplained. This surname is found almost exclusively in County Cork, having been recorded there since the first half of the 17th century; it may be of English origin.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: John Bustard was born in 1458, in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. He married Elizabeth Fox about 1483. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. He died in 1535, in his hometown, at the age of 77, and was buried in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: John Bustard est né en 1458, à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Il a épousé Elizabeth Fox environ 1483. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Il est décédé en 1535, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: John Bustard wurde 1458 in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England geboren. Er hat um 1483 Elizabeth Fox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Er starb 1535 im Alter von 77 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: John Bustard è nato il nel 1458 nel Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England. Lui sposato Elizabeth Fox circa 1483. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì nel 1535, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England.

ja.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアオクスフォード
ja.Adderbury, Oxfordshire, England: イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリー
ja.Fillongley, Warwickshire, England: イギリスワーウィクシュアイアフィロングリー
ja.lifeSummary: John Bustardは1458年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーで生まれた。約1483年にElizabeth Foxと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼は1535年に故郷で77歳で死去し，イギリスオクスフォードシュアイアアッドエルブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Bustard(은)는 1458년 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에서 태어났다. 그는 대략 1483년 Elizabeth Fox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1535년 그의 고향에서 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스퍼드실르 애더버이에 묻혔다.

mn.Oxford, Oxfordshire, England: Oxford, Oxenaford, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: John Bustard nasceu em 1458, em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Fox aproximadamente 1483. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1535, em sua cidade natal, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: John Bustard родился в 1458 г. в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Fox около 1483 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Он умер в 1535 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности аддирбури, оксфордшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: John Bustard nació en 1458, en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra. Se casó con Elizabeth Fox aproximadamente 1483. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió en 1535, en su pueblo, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Adderbury, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra.
